meaning: n.(天主教)葬礼应答圣咏(指葬礼上为死者做弥撒后所唱的应答圣咏)
examples: The third part is the character of the action libera in cause.
The term of "Actio libera in cause" was originated in continental law system.
Espartaco libera a miles de esclavos y luego es recapturado y crucificado.
But Marcello Cozzi, vice-president of Libera, a main anti-mafia organisation in Italy, says the mafia does not do business that is easily quantified.
